description: Style NoteThe understated and updated design details, fresh from sepia's design studio, makes this top the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, jeans and a floral scarf.Product DetailsBlue sleeveless top, has a scooped neck with pin-tucks from the neckline down, laced yoke at the back with a keyhole buttoned closureMaterial and CareBlended fabricGentle hand wash using mild detergentDo not scrub or bleachDry inside outCool iron; do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
